10.response: {"Q0":"The instructions and the format of the tutorial made everything perfectly clear."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I have no idea. Perhaps it's investigating whether performance/engagement metrics decline as potential monetary gain decreases?"}

13.response: {"Q0":"It's a really well-made study, and I had some fun. Also, thank you for paying participants (more than) fairly."}

0.response: {"Q0":"I haven't used any special strategies. During the clicking sections, when the blue astronaut left, I chose to collect red gems first because the average value of green ice had essentially halved. Additionally, during mixed sections, I prioritized galaxies with higher probability of winning to avoid overthinking things.\n\nThat's it, I think."}

1.response: {"Q0":"Yeah, as described in my answer to the last question: during the clicking sections, when the blue astronaut left, I chose to collect red gems first because the average value of green ice had essentially halved"}

8.response: {"Q0":"My primary criterion was simply which of the two had the higher probability of winning, although I sometimes opted for a higher-valued galaxy with slightly worse odds than the lower-valued alternative."}
